# BP-164 variant: a functional option overwrites a package-level defaults map.
lang: go
file: BP-164-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: option-global-map
---
package sample

type Config struct {
	Retries int
}

type Option func(*Config)

var defaultRetries = map[string]int{"api": 2}

func WithRetries(retries int) Option {
	return func(config *Config) {
		defaultRetries["api"] = retries
		config.Retries = retries
	}
}
